backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and manages contact form inquiries, exposing `submitInquiry` to add entries and `getAllInquiries` to retrieve them, with authorization via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four implemented features (admin password update, AdminPage rebuild, AdminInbox rebuild, /admin route) to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries describing the purpose and contents of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app using TanStack Router with two routes: `/` rendering the full public portfolio site and `/admin` rendering the password-protected AdminPage.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying Debraj Paul's profile photo, bio, skill tags, location badge, and a smooth-scroll CTA button linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/AdminInbox.tsx: Admin inbox component that fetches all contact form submissions via React Query, renders them as sorted cards with name, phone, business type, message, and timestamp, and includes loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/AdminPasswordGat: A password-protected gate component that wraps admin content, rendering children only after successful password authentication via the useAdminAuth hook.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: A contact form section that collects name, phone, business type, and message, then submits the inquiry via the useSubmitInquiry mutation hook with validation and success/error states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, contact links (phone, WhatsApp, email), quick navigation links, and a list of services with smooth-scroll behavior.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero landing section with a headline, subheadline, CTA buttons for contact form and WhatsApp, trust indicator stats, and decorative background elements.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a mobile menu, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality used for admin backend authentication.
frontend/src/components/PortfolioSection: Displays a grid of three sample portfolio projects (gym, lawyer, coaching) with images, tags, and a hover overlay that links to the contact section via a 'Request Demo' button.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Renders three pricing plan cards (Basic ₹2,500, Standard ₹3,500, Premium ₹5,000) with feature lists and WhatsApp CTA buttons, highlighting the Standard plan as most popular.
Shows a grid of five service cards (website design, landing pages, redesign, WhatsApp integration, SEO) plus a custom CTA card, each with colored icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat link and shows a tooltip on hover.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseMeSecti: Displays five benefit cards (48hr delivery, affordable pricing, modern design, WhatsApp support, no hidden charges) in a responsive grid with numbered decorations and colored icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Custom hook managing simple admin authentication via a hardcoded password, persisting the authenticated state in sessionStorage with login and logout helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for submitting a contact inquiry (`useSubmitInquiry`) and fetching all inquiries (`useGetInquiries`) from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark-blue OKLCH-based CSS custom property theme with utility classes for gradients, animations, and layout.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page component that wraps AdminInbox inside AdminPasswordGate, displaying a top bar with the site name, admin badge, and a logout button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts (Inter/Poppins), animations, shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, known issues, and pending action requests, primarily focused on rebuilding the password-protected admin inbox to display backend contact form submissions.
